violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Slicers used for cutting meats and cheeses were found dirty. Slicers should be cleaned after each use.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Handwashing in Bakery area did not have paper towels at hand sink.
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
